title: Create: Unbreakable Netherite Axe
description: This mods basically adds a new tool to chop down trees easier and not to loose a lot of items and resources
body:
![Mod icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17477b758a9ccac7ca641af67502d02a1fb6b272.png) ***

Create: Unbreakable Netherite Axe

Chopping trees in minecraft is very resources taking, so this mod fixes it by adding: **Unbreakable Netherite Axe** to the game with balanced and hard recipe for it: **![Axe recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1370303/description_677897a0-0106-463a-ad09-7c3abf100162.png)** An actual axe recipe
